headline: Hash Table
description: A hash table maps keys to values with average O(1) operations. Powers JavaScript Objects, Python dicts, database indexes. Collision resolution: chaining (linked lists) or open addressing (probing). Rehashing triggers at ~75% load factor.

citation.name: Data Structures and Algorithm Analysis (5th Edition, 2025)
citation.author: Weiss M.A.

citation.name: Hash-Based Data Structures: From Basic Tables to Learned Indexes (2025)
citation.author: multiple
